features: WELL MADE DURABLE - Discover the perfect packaging solution for your heartfelt gifts. A great value set of organza small gift pouches fabric and finished off with a ribbon drawstring. Strong and durable. Favour bags Available with size 7 x 9cm. These simple and sober elegant organza potli bags be used to carry or as a storage for any jewellery items like earrings, rings, bracelets and many other.

VALUE PACKAGEING - This jewellery storage bag contains 25 pouches, so that one-time purchase could last for a long time. Organza drawstring bags solid structure guarantees safe storage, while its transparency excludes long time of searching for a specific bag.

VARIOUS COLOURS - Our favor gift bags come in 14 colors. Enough for all kinds of visual projects that may need color-coded organization. Lot of Organza bags for storing pearls and other jewelry, gifts, candies, wedding favors, etc.

OPEN AND CLOSE EASILY - Design with a satin drawstring for closure. Drawstring pulls together and can be tied in a bow, ensure that items are not exposed, keeping your contents safe inside. Perfect for storage little things, you can find items easily from the clear tulle pouches. Great your time in gift wrapping saver

APPLICATION - These small organza bags suitable for wedding, baby shower or party gifts. Can also be used to jewellery, chocolates candies, cosmetics, sachets, fragrance etc. Great favour and gift bags for your wedding, shower, party, jewellery, craft items and more, also perfect for Xmas, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Valentine's Day.
description: Product Description WRAP YOUR GIFTS IN SHEER ELEGANCE ELEGANT & VERSATILE ORGANZA DRAWSTRING BAGS – THE PERFECT TOUCH FOR EVERY OCCASION Say goodbye to traditional wrapping paper. Our stunning organza bags offer a simple yet elegant way to present gifts. The translucent fabric allows a peek at the contents, building excitement, while the silky drawstring ensures your items are secure and beautifully presented. Ideal for birthdays, Christmas, and special celebrations FIND YOUR PERFECT SHADE With a huge variety of vibrant colours to choose from, you can perfectly match your party theme, brand colours, or personal style. Whether you need a festive red for Christmas favours, a classic gold for wedding gifts, or a mix of colours for a fun event, we have a bag for every need. JEWELLERY & TRINKETS PARTY & WEDDING HANDMADE CRAFTS EVENT ESSENTIALS MORE THAN JUST A GIFT BAG CRAFTED FOR DURABILITY & STYLE Our bags are meticulously crafted from high-quality, sheer organza fabric that is both durable and lightweight. The double-ribbon drawstring is designed to open and close smoothly, providing a secure closure while adding a beautiful finishing touch. Each bag is made to last and can be reused, making it an perfect choice.
